title: calanthe carinata
intro: Calanthe carinata, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calanthe carinata include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Calanthe carinata is typically prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
